allow: Bash(handle.exe "LTU_U15.Tests.csproj.FileListAbsolute.txt" 2>/dev/null || powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Modules.FileName -like '*LTU_U15*'}" 2>/dev/null || echo "handle tool not available")
